'''Lacy Devist''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] who was married to [[Carib Devist]] as of [[19 ABY/Legends|19 ABY]].

==Biography==
It was unlikely that Lacy knew her husband was in actuality a [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] of [[Baron/Legends|Baron]] [[Soontir Fel/Legends|Soontir Fel]], and was also an [[Imperial Intelligence/Legends|Imperial Intelligence]] agent planted on [[Pakrik Minor]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]]. She had a son and a daughter with Carib, who were named [[Daberin Devist|Daberin]] and [[Keena Devist]] respectively.

{{Char-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[Specter of the Past]]'' {{Ab|Specter of the Past (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
*''[[Vision of the Future]]'' {{Ab|Vision of the Future (unabridged audiobook)}}
